tools.name: steam_top_sellers
tools.description: Current top-selling games on Steam by region. Paid: $0.005 per call via x402 (payment in _meta['x402/payment']).

tools.name: steam_deals
tools.description: Value-ranked current Steam deals (discount + review score + savings). Paid: $0.005 per call via x402.

tools.name: twitch_hype
tools.description: Twitch categories ranked by hype score (viewer concentration x stream count) — leading indicator of trending games. Paid: $0.02 via x402.

tools.name: game_metadata
tools.description: IGDB game metadata: details, ratings, similar games. Paid: $0.005 via x402.

tools.name: steam_app_intel
tools.description: Full Steam app intelligence: details, live player count, review summary, owner estimate. Paid: $0.005 per call via x402.
